case_title: TAKAHASHI, MASASHI vs. MARMORSTEIN, TODD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARMORSTEIN, TODD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 231 VALLEY STREET #4, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $4,326.00 RENT, $675.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,156.00, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARMORSTEIN, TODD
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAKAHASHI, MASASHI AS TO DEFENDANT MARMORSTEIN, TODD DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARMORSTEIN, TODD

EHEWLETT, JUDGE; REDWARDS, CLERK;CGALLAGHER, CSR. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLNTF APPR BY ILENE HOCHSTEIN, NO APPR FOR DEF. PLNTF S/E. DOC EVID INTRO AND RETURNED. COURT FINDS FOR PLNTF MASASHI TAKAHASHI AND AGAINST DEF TODD MARMORSTEIN FOR $5156.00. JUDGMENT SIGNED.
